meta.notes: India MSEDCL (Maharashtra) residential LT-I is a stepped slab tariff (0-100, 101-300, 301-500, >500 kWh/month at rising rates set by MERC). Block tiers are a v1.1 schema feature — modelled here as the lowest slab. Rate APPROXIMATE (~2026) in INR/kWh — verify with MERC/MSEDCL. Excludes fixed charge, wheeling, FAC. Maharashtra (shaded at country level — no IN state polygons bundled yet).
